title: Badge: Saver Kid
resultWinDescription: You made {{score}} smart saving decisions out of {{total}} challenges!
savingSkillsBody: You learned to save regularly, keep money safe, and make smart financial decisions!
financialWisdomBody: These habits will help you achieve your financial goals!
resultKeepDescription: You made {{score}} smart saving decisions out of {{total}} challenges.
resultKeepBody: Remember, good saving habits include saving regularly, keeping money safe, and setting goals!

challenges.title: Piggy Bank
challenges.question: What is the best way to save money?

options.text: Save only when you have a lot

feedback.correct: Excellent! Regular saving, even small amounts, builds good habits!
feedback.wrong: The best way to save is to save a little bit regularly, not just when you have a lot!

challenges.title: Safe Savings
challenges.question: Where should you keep your savings?

options.text: In a shoe box at home
In a safe place like a bank

feedback.correct: Perfect! Keeping money in a bank keeps it safe and can help it grow!
feedback.wrong: Banks are the safest place to keep your savings - they protect your money!

challenges.title: Extra Money
challenges.question: What should you do with extra money?

options.text: Lose it or forget about it

feedback.correct: Amazing! Saving extra money helps you reach your goals faster!
feedback.wrong: Extra money should be saved for future goals, not spent immediately!

options.text: It helps you reach your goals

feedback.correct: Great! Saving money helps you achieve your dreams and goals!
feedback.wrong: Saving money is very important - it helps you reach your goals and be prepared!

challenges.title: Saving Habit
challenges.question: What is a good saving habit?

feedback.correct: Wonderful! Setting goals and saving regularly makes you a smart saver!
feedback.wrong: Good saving habits include setting goals and saving money regularly!
